prompt: Create a realistic lifestyle fashion photograph of a young woman standing on a quiet sunlit city sidewalk in the morning, framed from mid-thigh to above the head in vertical portrait orientation. She has long, voluminous soft pastel pink hair blowing slightly in the breeze and is lifting one hand to brush hair back near her right ear. Her face is intentionally obscured by a centered opaque square privacy block in a muted brown-pink skin-tone color, covering the entire facial area while leaving hair, neck, and body visible. She wears a fitted ribbed cream white sleeveless crop tank top and dark high-waisted denim jeans. Use natural candid street-photography styling with realistic body proportions, soft skin tones, and subtle fabric texture. The setting is an upscale urban street with pale building facades, shop windows on the right, sidewalk paving stones, and softly blurred storefronts and greenery receding into the background on the left. Lighting should feel like warm morning sunlight from the upper left, creating gentle highlights in the hair, soft shadows on the sidewalk, and a slightly airy overexposed film-photo look. Camera style: handheld eye-level portrait, shallow depth of field, 35mm documentary fashion photography, natural colors, no text, no logo, no watermark, no extra people, keep the pose casual and candid.
